title: Uruguayan Prawn Wrap
description: A quick and flavorful wrap filled with prawns, onions, and spices, inspired by the flavors of Uruguay. This recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and red pepper to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Return the prawns to the skillet and stir to combine with the onion and pepper mixture.
Warm the wrap in the microwave for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the prawn mixture onto the center of the wrap, followed by the crumbly cheese.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
